About the Creator

Learn more about the creator behind Paleoexotic.

Meet Cameron

Hello, Everyone! I created the site Paleoexotic to explore Earth’s history during the Paleozoic Era.

This project combines my interests in web design and prehistoric history.

I want to make learning about the past fun and easy to understand.

A major inspiration for this site is the Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History .

Skills & Interests

Web Design HTML CSS Responsive Design Science Prehistoric Life Digital Media

Education

Provide an accessible introduction to the Paleozoic era and key evolutionary events.

Design Practice

Practice modern web design techniques like Tailwind, Flexbox, and responsive layouts.

Creative Exploration

Combine visuals and layout design to make history more engaging.

Fun Break

Everyone needs a laugh once in awhile!

Fetching humor...
